MODULE: cosmos.integration.bio.interface
FILE: cosmos/integration/bio/interface.py (124 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

CLASSES:
- BioDataPacket
- BioInterfaceProvider(ABC): Abstract Base Class for Biological Interface Providers (e.g., Muse, OpenBCI, App
  Methods: async def connect(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def disconnect(self)
  Methods: async def get_stream(self) -> Any
  Methods: def health_check(self) -> bool
- BioIntegrationManager: Manages connections to multiple biological interfaces and normalizes data stream
  Methods: def register_provider(self, name: str, provider: BioInterfaceProvider)
  Methods: def add_subscriber(self, callback: Callable[[BioDataPacket], None])
  Methods: async def start_streaming(self)
  Methods: async def stop_all(self)
- MockBioProvider(BioInterfaceProvider): Simulated Bio-Interface for testing without hardware.
Generates random HRV and A
  Methods: async def connect(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def disconnect(self)
  Methods: async def get_stream(self)
  Methods: def health_check(self) -> bool
